title: Japanese Curacao Float
description: A unique dessert that combines Japanese flavors with a tropical twist. Layered with ice cream and a splash of liqueur, this dessert is perfect for hot summer nights.
instructions: Prepare the mochi ice cream according to the package instructions.
Cut the mochi into small pieces.
In a small bowl, mix together the sesame seeds and green tea powder.
In a separate bowl, mix together the granulated sugar and Curacao.
To assemble the dessert, place a scoop of mochi ice cream in a glass.
Sprinkle the sesame seed and green tea powder mixture over the ice cream.
Drizzle the sugar and Curacao mixture over the top.
Repeat the layers one more time, ending with a scoop of ice cream on top.
